languages.text: {n}Лицо Эоганна, и без того не отличающееся здоровым видом, окончательно лишается красок, но речь звучит твердо.{/n} "Я чту заветы Омниссии и не отступаюсь от истин Его".
{n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."
languages.original_text: {n}Лицо Эоганна, и без того не отличающееся здоровым видом, окончательно лишается красок, но речь звучит твердо.{/n} "Я чту заветы Омниссии и не отступаюсь от истин Его".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, turns utterly pale, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."
{n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, turns utterly pale, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."
{n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."
{n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."

languages.text: {n}El rostro de Eogunn, que normalmente ya es pálido, pierde por completo su color, pero su voz se mantiene firme.{/n} «Cumplo los preceptos del Omnissiah y no me alejo de Su verdad».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro de Eogunn, que normalmente ya es pálido, pierde por completo su color, pero su voz se mantiene firme.{/n} «Cumplo los preceptos del Omnissiah y no me alejo de Su verdad».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡本就毫无血色的脸庞变得更加苍白，但他坚定地说道：{/n}“我尊崇欧姆尼赛亚的教义，从未偏离祂所揭示的真理。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡本就毫无血色的脸庞变得更加苍白，但他坚定地说道：{/n}“我尊崇欧姆尼赛亚的教义，从未偏离祂所揭示的真理。”

languages.text: {n}Der ohnehin schon kränklich wirkende Eogunn wird leichenblass, spricht aber mit fester Stimme.{/n} "Ich ehre die Gebote des Omnissiah und weiche nicht von Seinen Wahrheiten ab."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der ohnehin schon kränklich wirkende Eogunn wird leichenblass, spricht aber mit fester Stimme.{/n} "Ich ehre die Gebote des Omnissiah und weiche nicht von Seinen Wahrheiten ab."

languages.text: {n}Le teint déjà maladif d'Eogunn se vide de toutes ses couleurs, mais c'est avec aplomb qu'il prend la parole :{/n} « Je reste fidèle aux préceptes de l'Omnimessie et à Ses vérités sacrées. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le teint déjà maladif d'Eogunn se vide de toutes ses couleurs, mais c'est avec aplomb qu'il prend la parole :{/n} « Je reste fidèle aux préceptes de l'Omnimessie et à Ses vérités sacrées. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un zaten sağlıklı olmaktan uzak olan teni tamamen renk atıyor. Yine de kararlı bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Hermesih'in ilkelerini onurlandırıyorum, O'nun gerçeklerinden sapmıyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un zaten sağlıklı olmaktan uzak olan teni tamamen renk atıyor. Yine de kararlı bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Hermesih'in ilkelerini onurlandırıyorum, O'nun gerçeklerinden sapmıyorum."

languages.text: {n}エゴンの健康状態は元々良くありませんでしたが、顔色が完全に失われました。しかし彼はしっかりと語ります。{/n}「私はオムニシアスの教義を尊重し、彼の真実から逸脱しません。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."

traits.locale_text: {n}エゴンの健康状態は元々良くありませんでしたが、顔色が完全に失われました。しかし彼はしっかりと語ります。{/n}「私はオムニシアスの教義を尊重し、彼の真実から逸脱しません。」
